sourceMovie.title: Daylight
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Daylight works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Matrix Revolutions
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Daylight clicked for you, The Matrix Revolutions (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Daylight?
faq.answer: Try The Matrix Revolutions, Armageddon, First Blood—each shares DNA with Daylight while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Daylight?
faq.answer: Daylight (1996) is best described as Action, Adventure, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Daylight worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
